prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南综合类最低位次分别约5182名、10136名、8154名、7228名、7578名。2022年因专业组调整出现较大波动后，近三年位次在7200–8200区间波动， 2025年基准位次约7578名，整体呈后移趋势；该校在海南省招生计划2021年47人、2022–2024年各42人、2025年38人，呈逐年缩减趋势；2026年计划扩至48人，较2025年增加10人（+26.3%），扩招幅度较大，将显著缓解竞争压力，推动最低位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 云南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中 国大学排名近年持续上升，2021年第83名→2025年第69名→2026年第71名，整体处于全国70名左右，属于中上游211层次；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要 因就业数据引发关注（生命科学学院就业率仅4.63%），可能轻微影响部分考生报考意愿；抖音热度排名第62位（一般），无明显热度助推。历史投档异常记录中未见云南大学断 档信号；第五轮学科评估中，民族学获A+、生态学获A、统计学获A-，均为该校王牌学科，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 海南省考生 总数持续增长：2021年约5.3万→2025年约6.7万→2026年约7.8万（+15.7%），考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争，2025年为480分，无明显波动；云南大学位于昆明市，属西南地区，与海南地理距离较远，跨省报考存在一定地域偏好影响，但该校作为211层次院校对海南考生仍有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7578名、2026年招生计划大幅扩招（+26.3%）、海南考生规模显著增长（+15.7%）以及学校声誉中性偏负面等因素，扩招是推动位次后移的最主要因 素，而考生规模增长则部分抵消了扩招的宽松效应。预测2026年最低位次约8805名，区间8305–9305名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约8805名，区间8305–9305名。建议位次在区间下限8305名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档热门专业（法学、计算机类）；位次在8805名左右的考生以二档优势学科（统计学 A-、经济学类、电子信息类）为主攻方向；位次在9305名附近的考生以三档专业保底，同时可关注扩招带来的机会。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Hainan Comprehensive category were approximately 5182, 10136, 8154, 7228, and 7578 respectively. After significant fluctuations in 2022 due to major group adjustments, the rankings have fluctuated within the 7200–8200 range in the past three years, with a baseline ranking of about 7578 in 2025, showing an overall backward trend. The university's enrollment plan in Hainan Province was 47 in 2021, 42 each from 2022 to 2024, and 38 in 2025, showing a gradual reduction trend. In 2026, the plan expands to 48, an increase of 10 (+26.3%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that will notably alleviate competitive pressure and push the minimum ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been rising in recent years, from 83rd in 2021 to 69th in 2025 and 71st in 2026, overall around 70th nationally, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly due to employment data concerns (the employment rate of the School of Life Sciences was only 4.63%), which may slightly affect some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 62nd (average), with no significant popularity boost. No historical admission anomalies such as gaps have been observed for Yunnan University. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ethnology received A+, Ecology received A, and Statistics received A-, all flagship disciplines of the university, which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The total number of candidates in Hainan Province continues to grow: from approximately 53,000 in 2021 to about 67,000 in 2025 and about 78,000 in 2026 (+15.7%), with the expansion of candidate numbers intensifying overall competition. In 2025, the score was 480, with no significant fluctuation. Yunnan University is located in Kunming, in the Southwest region, geographically distant from Hainan, so cross-province applications are subject to some regional preference influence, but as a 211-level institution, it still has strong appeal to Hainan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 7578, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+26.3%), the notable growth in Hainan candidate numbers (+15.7%), and the neutral-to-slightly-negative university reputation, the expansion is the primary factor driving the ranking backward, while the candidate number growth partially offsets the easing effect of the expansion. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 8805, with a range of 8305–9305.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 8805, range 8305–9305. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 8305 are advised to focus on Tier 1 popular majors (Law, Computer Science). Candidates around 8805 should target Tier 2 advantageous disciplines (Statistics A-, Economics, Electronic Information) as the main direction. Candidates near 9305 should secure Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also paying attention to opportunities brought by the expansion.
